name: NIB
description:
Before the line, there was the nib.

Every character begins somewhere. Before form, before identity… there was the point where it all started.

Every legend, every icon, and every character you’ve ever seen started the exact same way. A blank canvas. A moment of hesitation. And the first touch of ink.

$NIB is that exact moment. It is the universal truth behind every masterpiece and every chaotic scribble. Before the lines were clean, before the history was written, the nib was there.

name: Shrek
description: Shrek Rizz or Shrek Looking Up and Smiling refers to a clip from the 2007 animated film Shrek the Third in which the character Shrek smiles at Arthur to signify that he's okay after it appears he is stabbed. In the 2020s, Shrek's knowing smile in the scene was taken out of context and used as a reaction image, video and GIF to signify devious intent or rizz in memes.

name: June Senders
description:
June Senders is the wife of Burnie Senders, a married Soviet sleeper agent who Toly warned us about.

While Burnie Senders is doing what he is supposed to do, June Senders works behind the scenes supporting him.

Every time Burnie Senders opens his mouth, June Senders whispers into his ear, dictating his every move. She shows that for every move, there is someone shaping it.

creator: 0x8f9c337286a0bca5e1f9af142b33ddeaeb0bdcec
name: Elon Musk is obsessed with Simulation Theory. Not as a joke. Not as a thought experiment. The man genuinely believes we are living inside a simulation — and he has said it publicly, repeatedly, for nearly a decade. His most chilling line — June 2025: "Boring simulations get terminated to save compute costs." Every company he's ever built — SpaceX, Neuralink, xAI — maps to one goal: survive the simulation. Or build the next one.
